summary: A structured record of the Frasberg dual-reality banking, compliance, design-system, and Eternal-Origin law material for the Luchii documentation site.
normalizationNotes: Repeated architecture fragments were merged into one canonical dataset.
Reality and mythic representations share the same underlying compliance model.
Implementation examples were reduced to schemas, contracts, and component signatures.

entries.title: FMR-BP Dual-Reality UI States
entries.formalName: Frasberg Multi-Reality Banking Platform UI State Model
entries.summary: A three-mode rendering model for compliance outcomes across reality, mythic, and hybrid planes.

items.name: ALLOW
items.detail: Green compliant badge, low-friction state, and confirmation that the action meets regulatory requirements.

items.name: FLAG
items.detail: Amber review state with warning icon and expandable rule details.

items.name: BLOCK
items.detail: Red blocked state with remediation guidance and prevented primary action.

items.name: ESCALATE
items.detail: Orange investigation state with case id, status link, and workflow handoff.

items.name: HARMONIZED
items.detail: Origin Sigil, soft blue aura, and narrative that the action aligns with Eternal-Origin law.

items.name: DISTORTED
items.detail: Continuum Fracture glyph, amber distortion aura, and warning narrative for cosmic imbalance.

items.name: FORBIDDEN
items.detail: Non-Genesis Seal, crimson perimeter lock, and narrative that the action violates Eternal-Origin law.

items.name: ALLOW + HARMONIZED
items.detail: Shows compliant status and cosmic alignment in the same card.

items.name: FLAG + DISTORTED
items.detail: Shows review status with astral distortion detected.

items.name: BLOCK + FORBIDDEN
items.detail: Shows blocked status with explicit Eternal-Origin prohibition.

items.name: ESCALATE + DISTORTED/FORBIDDEN
items.detail: Shows case creation with cosmic imbalance or prohibition context.

entries.title: FFG-OS Canonical Event Schema
entries.summary: A single envelope format emitted by FFG-OS services into EOC-Engine for compliance evaluation.

items.name: envelopeVersion
items.detail: Top-level structural version for the event envelope.

items.name: eventId
items.detail: UUID for idempotency and event traceability.

items.name: eventType
items.detail: IdentityEvent, TransactionEvent, MarketEvent, or AccessEvent.

items.name: entityType
items.detail: User, Account, Wallet, Portfolio, or Device.

items.name: entityId
items.detail: Primary entity identifier for evaluation scope.

items.name: sourceService
items.detail: Service name that emitted the event.

items.name: timestamp
items.detail: ISO-8601 event time.

items.name: payloadVersion
items.detail: Domain payload version for backward compatibility.

items.name: payload
items.detail: Domain-specific body normalized by event type.

items.name: context
items.detail: Optional request metadata such as IP, deviceId, sessionId, and geo.

items.name: correlationId
items.detail: Cross-service request correlation id.

items.name: IdentityEvent
items.detail: Uses changeType, kycStatus, and riskTier for onboarding and profile changes.

items.name: TransactionEvent
items.detail: Uses txnType, amount, currency, direction, and account or wallet references.

items.name: MarketEvent
items.detail: Uses symbol, side, quantity, price, and simulationId for market simulations.

items.name: AccessEvent
items.detail: Uses action, deviceRisk, and behaviorScore for authentication and session events.

items.name: reality.decision
items.detail: ALLOW, FLAG, BLOCK, or ESCALATE.

items.name: reality.riskScore
items.detail: Numeric risk score aggregated by the compliance pipeline.

items.name: reality.rulesTriggered
items.detail: Triggered regulatory rule identifiers.

items.name: mythic.status
items.detail: HARMONIZED, DISTORTED, or FORBIDDEN.

items.name: mythic.cosmicRiskIndex
items.detail: Numeric mythic risk overlay derived from the same event.

items.name: mythic.lawsTriggered
items.detail: Triggered Eternal-Origin law identifiers.

entries.title: FFG-OS Service Event Contracts
entries.summary: Service-specific event payload contracts built on top of the canonical compliance envelope.

items.name: identity-service -> compliance-rules-service
items.detail: IdentityEvent with changeType, kycStatus, and riskTier.

items.name: ledger-service -> compliance-rules-service
items.detail: TransactionEvent with txnType LEDGER_POST and ledger transaction fields.

items.name: wallet-blueprint-service -> compliance-rules-service
items.detail: TransactionEvent with txnType WALLET_SIM and wallet simulation fields.

items.name: trading-sim-service -> compliance-rules-service
items.detail: MarketEvent with symbol, side, quantity, price, and simulationId.

items.name: auth-gateway -> compliance-rules-service
items.detail: AccessEvent with action, deviceRisk, and behaviorScore.

items.name: Envelope Versioning
items.detail: Increment only for top-level structural changes.

items.name: Payload Versioning
items.detail: Increment when per-domain payload contracts change.

items.name: Compatibility Window
items.detail: Services support current and previous versions during rolling upgrades.

items.name: Normalization
items.detail: EOC-Engine accepts multiple versions and normalizes internally.

entries.title: Eternal-Origin Law Codex v1.0
entries.summary: A law mapping layer that translates enterprise compliance domains into Eternal-Origin mythic interpretations.

items.name: EO-L1 Law of Origin-Identity
items.detail: Identity coherence; mapped to KYC, KYB, CDD, and EDD.

items.name: EO-L2 Law of Continuum Purity
items.detail: Clean value flows; mapped to AML, sanctions, and transaction monitoring.

items.name: EO-L3 Law of Balanced Exchange
items.detail: Market fairness and equilibrium; mapped to suitability and best execution.

items.name: EO-L4 Law of Veiled Identity
items.detail: Privacy and consent; mapped to data protection and retention rules.

items.name: EO-L5 Law of Cosmic Accountability
items.detail: Auditability and governance; mapped to reporting, oversight, and internal controls.

items.name: originClarity
items.detail: Used to assess EO-L1 thresholds.

items.name: continuumIntegrity
items.detail: Used to assess EO-L2 thresholds.

items.name: exchangeBalance
items.detail: Used to assess EO-L3 thresholds.

items.name: veilStrength
items.detail: Used to assess EO-L4 thresholds.

items.name: ledgerEchoIntensity
items.detail: Used to assess EO-L5 thresholds.

items.name: HARMONIZED
items.detail: High attribute integrity and no material mythic violations.

items.name: DISTORTED
items.detail: Intermediate attribute integrity requiring scrutiny or review.

items.name: FORBIDDEN
items.detail: Low integrity state with a hard law violation or prohibition.

entries.title: Reality-Mythic Design Tokens
entries.summary: A token layer for shared colors, typography, spacing, glyph references, motion, and grid behavior.

items.name: status.review
items.detail: #FFC107

items.name: mythic.origin
items.detail: #4FC3F7

items.name: mythic.distortion
items.detail: #FFB74D

items.name: font.family.primary
items.detail: Frasberg Sans, system-ui

items.name: font.family.mythic
items.detail: Frasberg Astral Serif, serif

items.name: space
items.detail: xs 4px, sm 8px, md 16px, lg 24px.

items.name: radius
items.detail: sm 4px, md 8px, lg 12px.

items.name: grid
items.detail: 12 columns, 16px gutter, 24px desktop margin, 16px mobile margin.

items.name: duration.fast
items.detail: 120ms

items.name: duration.medium
items.detail: 200ms

items.name: duration.slow
items.detail: 280ms

items.name: duration.mythicPulse
items.detail: 800ms

items.name: duration.mythicLock
items.detail: 400ms

entries.title: Component Blueprint Library
entries.summary: Core frontend primitives for reality, mythic, and hybrid compliance rendering.

items.name: StatusBadge
items.detail: Renders ALLOW, FLAG, BLOCK, and ESCALATE status badges.

items.name: RiskMeter
items.detail: Maps numeric risk to low, medium, and high visual bands.

items.name: RuleList
items.detail: Shows triggered regulatory rules as a structured list.

items.name: CaseLink
items.detail: Links to case-management state when escalation occurs.

items.name: GlyphStatus
items.detail: Renders HARMONIZED, DISTORTED, or FORBIDDEN glyph states.

items.name: AstralIndexBar
items.detail: Displays cosmicRiskIndex with mythic thresholds.

items.name: LawTagList
items.detail: Shows triggered Eternal-Origin law tags.

items.name: MythicNarrative
items.detail: Provides short lore text tied to the law state.

items.name: HybridComplianceCard
items.detail: Fuses reality decisioning and mythic overlay into one card.

items.name: RealityToggle
items.detail: Switches between reality, mythic, and hybrid render modes.

items.name: ModeProvider
items.detail: Persists and distributes active rendering mode at runtime.

entries.title: Event Bus Topics and Subscriptions
entries.summary: Topic-level data flow showing how services publish, consume, and render compliance evaluations.

items.name: identity.events
items.detail: Produced by identity-service, auth-gateway, and device-trust-service.

items.name: transaction.events
items.detail: Produced by ledger-service, wallet-blueprint-service, and payments-blueprint-service.

items.name: market.events
items.detail: Produced by trading-sim-service and treasury-service.

items.name: access.events
items.detail: Produced by auth-gateway and device-trust-service.

items.name: compliance.evaluations.v1
items.detail: Produced by EOC-Engine and consumed by UI and case workflows.

items.name: EOC-Engine
items.detail: Subscribes to identity, transaction, market, and access topics and publishes evaluations.

items.name: risk-ai-service
items.detail: Subscribes to identity, transaction, and market topics for risk scoring.

items.name: fraud-ai-service
items.detail: Subscribes to access and transaction topics and publishes fraud alerts.

items.name: FMR-BP
items.detail: Subscribes to compliance evaluations and fraud alerts to render reality, mythic, and hybrid states.

entries.title: UI Runtime Patterns
entries.summary: Shared runtime behavior for mode switching, animation, interaction, accessibility, and layout.

items.name: Mode Persistence
items.detail: Rendering mode is stored per user and reused across screens.

items.name: Interaction States
items.detail: Reality uses elevation and focus rings; mythic uses aura and glyph glow; hybrid uses both.

items.name: Action Gating
items.detail: BLOCK disables primary actions; ESCALATE exposes case-management paths.

items.name: Text Equivalents
items.detail: Every glyph must have an accessible label and text equivalent.

items.name: Reduced Motion
items.detail: Mythic pulses, flickers, and waves can be disabled globally.

items.name: Rendering Budget
items.detail: Hybrid mode switches target sub-200ms transitions with GPU-friendly transforms.

items.name: Dual Panel Desktop
items.detail: Reality and mythic planes split into paired panels on larger screens.

items.name: Stacked Mobile
items.detail: Reality and mythic content stacks vertically on smaller screens.

items.name: Hybrid Center Card
items.detail: Hybrid mode centers a fused card with optional context panels.
